meta.title: StratosCore — AI software factory
meta.description: We design and operate world-class software, 10× faster, with AI agents that work for you.

hero.subtitle: StratosCore is where serious companies turn ideas into living platforms. AI, automation, world-class design — in one system.

manifesto.text: Software is no longer a cost. It's your competitive edge — or your bottleneck. We make it your edge.

clients.title: Companies building their future with us

capabilities.title: A complete operating system for your business
capabilities.subtitle: We don't sell isolated features. We design infrastructure that grows with your company.

platforms.title: Custom platforms
platforms.description: Web, mobile, dashboards, APIs. Multi-tenant architecture ready to scale from day one.

automation.title: Deep automation
automation.description: Flows that eliminate repetitive work. WhatsApp, Telegram, email, voice — integrated with your operation.

agents.title: Operational AI agents
agents.description: Not chatbots. Digital collaborators that execute tasks, make decisions, and learn.

intelligence.title: Real-time intelligence
intelligence.description: Dashboards that don't just show metrics — they tell you what to do before the problem grows.

agents.title: An 11-agent AI team working for you
agents.subtitle: While you sleep, your operation keeps running. Each agent has a specialty, persistent memory, and secure access to your data.

case.title: From spreadsheets to AI-powered predictions — in 6 weeks
case.body: We replaced a manual planning process with a platform featuring ML forecasting, real-time variance analysis, and competitive radar. The team went from reacting to anticipating.

numbers.title: The math of working with us

stack.title: Built with the best in every category
stack.subtitle: No shortcuts, no exotic stacks. Tools proven by the world's most demanding companies.

cta.title: Your next platform starts with a conversation.
cta.subtitle: Tell us what you're building. We reply in under 24 hours with a concrete plan.
